name: cywater-wordpress
description: Local WordPress integration tooling for CYWater.

scripts.wp:start: npm run vendor:prepare && npm run wp:config && wp-env --config wordpress/runtime/wp-env.local.json start --update
scripts.wp:stop: npm run wp:config && wp-env --config wordpress/runtime/wp-env.local.json stop
scripts.wp:destroy: npm run wp:config && wp-env --config wordpress/runtime/wp-env.local.json destroy
scripts.wp:cli: npm run wp:config && wp-env --config wordpress/runtime/wp-env.local.json run cli wp
scripts.prepare: npm run assets:sync && npm run content:export
